type.description: Indicates that the Policy is an authorization server Policy

clients.description: Specifies which clients are included in the policy

include.description: Which clients are included in the policy

priority.description: Specifies the order in which this Policy is evaluated in relation to the other Policies in a custom authorization server

status.description: Specifies whether requests have access to this Policy

system.description: Specifies whether Okta created this Policy

created.description: Timestamp when the Policy was created

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the Policy was last updated

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

rules.description: Link to the authorization server policy's rules

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
